title: ActiveFence | Guardrails
description: ActiveFence Guardrails monitors generative AI inputs and outputs in real-time. It enforces customizable policies across text, image, audio, and video, providing live visibility and intervening to prevent unsafe or misaligned behaviors with contextualized localization in 20+ languages.

items: Alert on anomalies;  e.g., goal reversal, unexpected plan depth, adversarial-input, excessive tool usage, or rapid inter-agent chatter.
Audit reflection accuracy by comparing stated & observed planning outcomes.
Enforce zero-trust policies between agents, tools, & external APIs, Apply & manage runtime Guardrails, Configure Inter-agent authorization policies, capabilities, & roles
